menu_options.wechat_scan: Sign in with WeChat QR code

keys.title: Bemfa Cloud credentials
keys.description: Add the Bemfa Cloud account first. You can choose which Home Assistant entities to sync in the next step.

wechat_scan.title: Sign in with WeChat
wechat_scan.description:
Scan this QR code with WeChat. This page will continue automatically after the scan succeeds.

You can choose which Home Assistant entities to sync in the next step.

![WeChat QR code]({qr_image})

setup_next.title: Next: sync your devices
setup_next.description:
The Bemfa Cloud account has been verified. Click **Submit** to finish adding it.

Then return to the Bemfa Cloud card, click **Configure**, and choose **Add syncs in bulk** to select the devices you want to sync.

Only selected entities will be created in Bemfa Cloud.

progress.wechat_scan:
Scan this QR code with WeChat. This page will continue automatically after the scan succeeds.

![WeChat QR code]({qr_image})

error.wechat_not_scanned: No successful WeChat scan was found yet. Scan the QR code, then submit again.
error.wechat_qr_failed: Failed to get the WeChat QR code. Try again later.
error.wechat_login_failed: Failed to complete WeChat login. Try again later.

abort.already_configured: This Bemfa account is already configured
abort.wechat_not_scanned: No successful WeChat scan was found before the QR code expired. Try again.
abort.wechat_qr_failed: Failed to get the WeChat QR code. Try again later.
abort.wechat_login_failed: Failed to complete WeChat login. Try again later.
abort.oauth_missing_uid: OAuth succeeded, but the token response did not include a valid Bemfa private key.

error.cannot_sync: Failed to sync to Bemfa Cloud. Check that the private key is correct, the network is reachable, and see the Home Assistant logs for details.

create_all_syncs.title: Add syncs in bulk
create_all_syncs.description: Select the main devices you want to create in Bemfa Cloud. Status and diagnostic entities are hidden here; use Add one sync if you need them.

destroy_sync.title: Remove local sync
destroy_sync.description: This only stops this integration from syncing the selected topics. It does not delete topics from Bemfa Cloud.
